opportunity.title: I wrote a open source iMessage for your AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing messages through LLMs introduces latency considerations—especially with multi-provider setups. The real challenge becomes efficient context management across turns, as each LLM hop adds to the token count and potential for drift from the initial prompt. Consider a caching layer for frequently accessed data to mitigate these costs.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building AI agent infrastructure, including message routing and tool integration, so I can offer informed perspective on this project.
